name: Baked Red Snapper
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Olive Oil or Vegetable Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the Red Snapper Fillets into 8 serving pieces.
2. Place fish fillets in a shallow glass or plastic dish.
3. Mix milk and oregano, then pour over the fish. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
4. Cook onion in oil until tender in a 10-inch skillet.
5. Stir in remaining ingredients except fish. Simmer uncovered until thickened, about 15 minutes.
6. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
7. Drain fish fillets and pat dry with paper towels.
8. Place one piece of fish on each of eight 12-inch squares of heavy duty aluminum foil.
9. Spoon some tomato mixture onto the fish.
10. Fold foil over the fish and seal securely.
11. Place foil packets in an ungreased jelly roll pan, 15-1/2 x 10-1/2 x 1 inch.
12. Bake until fish flakes easily with a fork, about 30 minutes.
13. Serve with snipped fresh cilantro and lemon wedges if desired.
